actionUnits.condition: Call Mirar.Mira() (public no-arg) on MonoBehaviour bound to PosAparicionBola to enable its Canvas. Scene MonoBehaviour_0 uses m_Script guid=8817b2a8c34ba5d4d941beaf47d0be6f (Mirar), canvas ref fileID=3689742487867136667, camaraAMirar defaults to Camera.main. This method is not automatically invoked elsewhere, so manual trigger is required.

Call Mirar.Para() (public no-arg) on MonoBehaviour bound to PosAparicionBola to disable its Canvas. Same component as above: m_Script guid=8817b2a8c34ba5d4d941beaf47d0be6f. This method is not automatically invoked elsewhere, so manual trigger is required.
